scripts.build: npm run build -w @mk/database && npm run build -w @mk/api && npm run build -w @mk/web
scripts.dev:all: sh scripts/check-local-dev.sh && npm run dev:db && npm run dev:prepare && concurrently -k -n api,web -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev:api" "npm run dev:web"
scripts.dev:prepare: npm run db:generate && npm run db:migrate:deploy && npm run db:seed
scripts.check:build: npm run build -w @mk/database && npm run build -w @mk/api && npm run build -w @mk/web
